news.t: Inspire Investing Announces Lower Expense Ratios on 5 Faith-Based ETFs
Inspire's Founding Faith-Based ETFs Celebrate 7 Years of Trading
Inspire ETFs Reports Expense Ratio Reductions for 7 Funds
Inspire Investing's Founding Biblical ESG ETFs Celebrate 5 Years of Trading

holdings.infoBox: ISMD is an equity ETF with a total of 499 individual holdings. The top holdings are agilon health stock at 2.32%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 1.31%, MaxLinear at 0.81%, Penguin Solutions at 0.61%, and Ambiq Micro at 0.56%.

overview.description: The Inspire Small/Mid Cap ETF (ISMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 500 small- and mid-cap US stocks that are screened for alignment with biblical values defined by the Issuer. ISMD was launched on Feb 28, 2017 and is issued by Inspire.
infoTable: Inspire Small/Mid Cap Impact Equal Weight Index
